threats.title: DPRK-Linked Hackers Use GitHub as C2 in Multi-Stage Attacks Targeting South Korea
threats.summary: Threat actors likely associated with the Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK) have been observed using GitHub as command-and-control (C2) infrastructure in multi-stage attacks targeting organizations in South Korea. threats.title: Qilin and Warlock Ransomware Use Vulnerable Drivers to Disable 300+ EDR Tools
